<?php namespace App\Http\Controllers\Auth; use App\Http\Controllers\Controller; use App\Models\User; use Illuminate\Auth\Events\Registered; use Illuminate\Http\Request; use Illuminate\Http\Response; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Auth; use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Hash; use Illuminate\Validation\Rules; class RegisteredUserController extends Controller { /** * Handle an incoming registration request. * * @throws \Illuminate\Validation\ValidationException */ public function store(Request $request): Response { $request->validate([ 'name' => ['required', 'string', 'max:255'], 'email' => ['required', 'string', 'lowercase', 'email', 'max:255', 'unique:'.User::class], 'password' => ['required', 'confirmed', Rules\Password::defaults()], ]); $user = User::create([ 'name' => $request->name, 'email' => $request->email, 'password' => Hash::make($request->string('password')), ]); event(new Registered($user)); Auth::login($user); return response()->noContent(); } }
